sentences.target: On suit la flèche vers l'entrée.

translations.fr: On suit la flèche vers l'entrée.
translations.en: We follow the arrow to the entrance.
translations.es: Seguimos la flecha hacia la entrada.
translations.de: Wir folgen dem Pfeil zum Eingang.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们沿着箭头前往入口。
translations.ru: Мы следуем по стрелке ко входу.
translations.pt: Seguimos a seta até a entrada.
translations.he: אנחנו עוקבים אחרי החץ אל הכניסה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi theo mũi tên đến lối vào.
translations.nl: We volgen de pijl naar de ingang.
translations.uk: Ми йдемо за стрілкою до входу.
translations.hu: A nyilat követve a bejárathoz megyünk.
translations.hi: हम तीर का अनुसरण करते हुए प्रवेश द्वार तक जाते हैं.
translations.el: Ακολουθούμε το βέλος προς την είσοδο.
translations.id: Kami mengikuti panah menuju pintu masuk.
translations.ja: 矢印に従って入口へ向かいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun ('on'), here used colloquially as 'we'; controls 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular; takes 'la flèche' as direct object and 'vers l'entrée' as a directional complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'flèche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'suit'.
Preposition indicating direction toward a goal.
Noun 'entrée' with elided definite article 'l''; object of the preposition 'vers'.

sentences.target: Je cherche la flèche près des ascenseurs.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ la flɛʃ pʁɛ dez asɑ̃sœʁ/

translations.fr: Je cherche la flèche près des ascenseurs.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ la flɛʃ pʁɛ dez asɑ̃sœʁ/
translations.en: I'm looking for the arrow near the elevators.
translations.es: Busco la flecha cerca de los ascensores.
translations.de: Ich suche den Pfeil bei den Aufzügen.
translations.it: Sto cercando la freccia vicino agli ascensori.
translations.yue: 我喺升降機附近搵箭嘴。
translations.pt: Estou procurando a seta perto dos elevadores.
translations.he: אני מחפש את החץ ליד המעליות.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm mũi tên gần thang máy.
translations.nl: Ik zoek de pijl bij de liften.
translations.hu: A liftek közelében keresem a nyilat.
translations.hi: मैं लिफ्टों के पास तीर ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω το βέλος κοντά στα ασανσέρ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter pilen ved heisene.
translations.id: Saya mencari panah di dekat lift.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter pilen vid hissarna.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter pilen ved elevatorerne.
translations.ja: エレベーターの近くで矢印を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st singular; transitive ('to look for').
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'flèche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition used with 'de' to form the complex preposition 'près de' meaning 'near'.
Contraction of preposition 'de' + definite article 'les'; introduces the plural NP 'ascenseurs' after 'près'.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the prepositional phrase 'près des'.

sentences.target: La flèche indique le sens unique.

translations.fr: La flèche indique le sens unique.
translations.en: The arrow shows the one-way direction.
translations.es: La flecha indica el sentido único.
translations.de: Der Pfeil zeigt die Einbahnrichtung an.
translations.it: La freccia indica il senso unico.
translations.vi: Mũi tên cho biết hướng một chiều.
translations.ar: السهم يشير إلى اتجاه السير باتجاه واحد.
translations.nl: De pijl geeft de richting van het eenrichtingsverkeer aan.
translations.hu: A nyíl az egyirányú forgalom irányát jelzi.
translations.el: Το βέλος δείχνει την κατεύθυνση του μονόδρομου.
translations.id: Panah menunjukkan arah jalan satu arah.
translations.da: Pilen viser retningen for ensrettet trafik.
translations.ja: 矢印は一方通行の方向を示します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun 'flèche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'indique'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular; takes 'le sens unique' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'sens'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'indique'.
Adjective modifying 'sens'; in the fixed expression 'sens unique' meaning 'one-way'.

sentences.target: Regarde la flèche sur le panneau.

translations.fr: Regarde la flèche sur le panneau.
translations.en: Look at the arrow on the sign.
translations.es: Mira la flecha en el letrero.
translations.de: Schau dir den Pfeil auf dem Schild an.
translations.vi: Nhìn mũi tên trên biển báo.
translations.nl: Kijk naar de pijl op het bord.
translations.hu: Nézd meg a nyilat a táblán.
translations.hi: बोर्ड पर बने तीर को देखो.
translations.el: Κοίτα το βέλος πάνω στην πινακίδα.
translations.ro: Uită-te la săgeata de pe panou.
translations.cs: Podívej se na šipku na ceduli.
translations.ja: 看板の矢印を見てください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular of 'regarder'; main predicate addressing the addressee.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'flèche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'Regarde'.
Preposition marking location; introduces the prepositional phrase 'sur le panneau'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'panneau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.
